description: Sample invoice texts for local testing. The grader uses DIFFERENT hidden invoices.

output_schema.amount: number — subtotal before tax (null if not found)
output_schema.tax: number — tax amount (null if not found)
output_schema.currency: string e.g. INR, USD (null if not found)

samples.invoice_text:
INVOICE
Invoice No: INV-2026-0041
Date: 15 March 2026
Vendor: TechParts Pvt Ltd
Bill To: IITM Procurement Dept

Items:
  USB-C Hub (x2) ............. Rs. 1,299.00
  HDMI Cable (x3) ............. Rs.   450.00
                                ----------
  Subtotal ...................  Rs. 2,199.00
  GST (18%) ..................  Rs.   395.82
                                ----------
  TOTAL ......................  Rs. 2,594.82
Currency: INR

COMMERCIAL INVOICE
Invoice #: 2026-MKT-009
Date: April 3, 2026
Seller: Bright Displays Ltd

Description: LED Monitor 27" (qty 5) @ USD 320 each
Subtotal: USD 1,600.00
VAT (10%): USD 160.00
Grand Total: USD 1,760.00
